subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the love of Bahá! Be thou an emblem of righteousness, a light of guidance, and a banner of faithfulness, ever-vigilant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه الی حب البهاء کونی ایه التقی و نور الهدی و رایه الوفاء منتبهه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
